name: verity-mcp
description: MCP server for Verity healthcare API - Medicare coverage policies, prior auth, and medical codes

scripts.guard:release-tag: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); const expected='v'+pkg.version; const actual=process.env.GITHUB_REF_NAME; if (actual !== expected) { throw new Error('Release ref '+(actual || '<unset>')+' does not match package version '+expected); }"
